question.text: As on January 7, 2026, approximately how many AIFs were registered with SEBI?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As on January 7, 2026, 1,748 AIFs were registered with SEBI. Starting with just 21 funds in 2012, the industry has seen explosive growth. Capital commitments raised by all registered AIFs across categories surpassed INR 13.49 lakh crores as on March 31, 2025. **The Trap:** The number of AIFs has been growing rapidly, so older study materials may show lower numbers. Always refer to the latest workbook edition for current figures. **Cross-Exam Context:** Current market statistics are tested to ensure candidates understand the scale and growth trajectory of the AIF industry. Similar market size questions appear in Series V-A for the mutual fund industry. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Use the growth trajectory (21 funds in 2012 to 1,748 in 2026) when pitching to potential investors — it demonstrates institutional confidence in the AIF framework and growing acceptance of alternative investments in India.
